header.headline: Kernel Registry Flow
header.subtitle: Track how an abstract operator resolves into a concrete runtime artifact.

stage_1.title: IR Operation
stage_1.body: Start from the canonical operator intent.

stage_2.title: Registry Lookup
stage_2.body: Match the op to a supported kernel family.

stage_3.title: Kernel Selector
stage_3.body: Choose the implementation for shape and policy.

stage_4.title: Generated Runtime
stage_4.body: Compile the selected kernel plan into the runtime artifact.

terminal.title: Linked Runtime
terminal.body: The final runtime uses only registered, validated kernels.

footer.title: Compiler Boundary
footer.body: The registry boundary is a clean deterministic interface for the first strict system_diagram family.
